name: Nifty Hamburgers on a Bun
recipeInstructions:
1. Choose small hamburger buns or use 6 slices of bread.
2. Preheat oven to 500°F (260°C).
3. Spread mustard on the cut sides of the buns or one side of each bread slice.
4. Mix ground beef, chopped onion, salt, and pepper in a bowl until combined.
5. Spoon the meat mixture onto the mustard-covered buns, spreading it evenly and bringing it to the edges.
6. Place the buns on an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Bake for about 5 minutes or until the desired doneness is reached.
8. If preparing ahead of time, spread the meat mixture over the buns, wrap securely in heavy-duty aluminum foil, label, and freeze up to 2 months.
9. To serve, unwrap the desired number of burgers and bake for an additional 10 minutes.
